title: Thundercade
body:
# Thundercade

Denver experimental project; a Ryan McRyhew band/project (alongside his other work in Hideous Men, Thug Entrancer, etc.).

## Connection to Colin

Track 14 of REMIX10: **"THUNDERCADE-PERIOD OF THE FUNCTION (deep tattoo smooches mix)"** — Colin's "deep tattoo smooches mix." Reinforces the McRyhew–Colin remix dialogue (Hideous Men also appeared on REMIX09 + REMIX10).
